name: CCB Principal Asset Management Co. - CCBP SCI Technology Innovation 3 years MXD
summary: CCB Principal Asset Management Co. - CCBP SCI Technology Innovation 3 years MXD is a fund managed by CCB Principal Asset Management that focuses on investing in companies involved in science and technology innovation with a mixed allocation to stocks and bonds, and a three-year investment horizon. The fund aims to capture the growth potential of the technology sector while managing risk through diversification.
